description_long: This electric drill features a long, cylindrical body with a metallic finish, primarily in shades of gray and black. The drill has two parallel shafts, each ending in a pointed, helical drill bit, suggesting it is designed for heavy-duty or specialized tasks. The central section includes jointed connectors and mechanical couplings, possibly for adjusting the angle or spacing of the drill bits. The surface appears to be made of metal with some rubberized or plastic components at the joints and grips. There are no visible power cords or battery packs, indicating the power source is not externally attached. The overall design is industrial and robust, suitable for urban construction or maintenance work.
description: A robust, dual-shaft electric drill with metallic and dark gray finishes, featuring two helical drill bits and jointed connectors for heavy-duty tasks.
description_view_0: Angled view showing both parallel shafts, jointed connectors, and the detailed helical drill bits.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the drill, with both bits aligned and the cylindrical body visible.
description_view_2: Opposite angled view, again showing the dual shafts and mechanical joints, with a clear look at the drill bits.
description_view_3: Top-down view emphasizing the cylindrical body and the alignment of the two shafts.
